name: APA Research Paper / Thesis
description: APA-style research paper or thesis chapter — common in social sciences, education, and psychology.

sections.title: Title Page
sections.purpose: APA title page — title, author, affiliation, course (if a paper), instructor, due date.
sections.formatting_notes: APA 7th: title in upper half of page, centered, bold, Title Case.

sections.title: Abstract
sections.purpose: Concise, single-paragraph summary of the study.
sections.formatting_notes: One paragraph, no indentation, no citations.

sections.title: Keywords
sections.purpose: Provide APA-style keywords directly below the abstract.
sections.formatting_notes: Italicised 'Keywords:' label followed by lowercase comma-separated list.

sections.title: Introduction
sections.purpose: Establish topic, importance, prior research, gap, and research question(s).
sections.formatting_notes: Heading uses Level 1 APA style (centered, bold, title case). Do NOT label this section 'Introduction' in APA 7th — the title functions as the introduction heading.

sections.title: Literature Review
sections.purpose: Thematic review of prior empirical and theoretical work.

sections.title: Method
sections.purpose: Describe participants, design, materials, and procedure with full reproducibility.
sections.formatting_notes: Use APA Level 2 subheadings: Participants, Design, Materials, Procedure.

sections.title: Results
sections.purpose: Present findings with descriptive and inferential statistics; no interpretation.
sections.formatting_notes: Report APA stats: M, SD, t(df) = X, p, d. Tables follow APA 7 format.

sections.title: Discussion
sections.purpose: Interpret findings, link to prior work, and acknowledge limitations.
sections.formatting_notes: Use Level 2 subheadings for Implications, Limitations, Future Research.

sections.title: Conclusion
sections.purpose: Concise closing statement of the contribution.
sections.formatting_notes: Optional in APA — fold into Discussion if the journal prefers.

sections.title: References
sections.purpose: Full APA 7 reference list of all cited works.
sections.formatting_notes: APA 7: Surname, F. M. (Year). Title in sentence case. Journal Name, Volume(Issue), pp-pp. https://doi.org/...
sections.citation_example: Smith, J., & Johnson, A. (2023). A title in sentence case. Journal of X, 12(3), 1-9. https://doi.org/10.xxxx/xxxxx

sections.title: Appendix A: Materials
sections.purpose: Supplementary materials such as questionnaires, stimuli, or full instruments.
common_mistakes: Burying critical detail in main body when it belongs in appendix
sections.formatting_notes: Each appendix on a new page, labeled A, B, C.

sections.title: Appendix B: Supplementary Analyses
sections.purpose: Additional analyses or robustness checks supporting the main findings.
sections.formatting_notes: Reference each table as Table B1, B2, etc.
